transcript:
[00:13] Agent: Hi, this is Sarah from ABC Medical Group. I'm calling about a claim — is this the claims department?
[00:16] Human: Yes. Yes.
[00:26] Agent: Our patient, Rahul Sharma, member MEM-10001, has claim CLM-2025-001. Could you check the status for me?
[00:29] Human: It is approved.
[00:41] Agent: I'm going to confirm now. The rep confirmed that the claim CLM-2025-001 for Rahul Sharma is approved. Perfect. So it's approved — correct?
[00:44] Human: Yes.
[00:55] System: DTMF 1 received
[01:01] Human: Hello. Are you there?
[01:08] Agent: I'm here. You confirmed the claim is approved. I'll now finalize. Thanks so much, have a great day!
[01:11] Human: Thank you.
